current_evidence: All numerical fixed-point iterations are monotone and end with ratio <=1. Equal attracts all non-extreme starts; extreme starts can converge to boundary-like non-equal points, still with ratio below 1.
name: KKT No-Violation Proof Obligation
not_yet_proved: A rigorous exclusion of positive-ratio non-equal interior maximizers.
statement_needed: Every positive interior maximizer of the Golay shell-domination objective is the equal point, and every boundary maximizer is bounded by the already-certified indicator/boundary inequalities.
why_it_would_close: If interior critical points are equal and boundary faces are certified, then the shell-domination objective has no positive maximizer.
